blockers.title: TxLINE public derived-display, caching, and retention permission
evidence: architecture.md Q7 and A9-A10: requester confirmed the required TxODDS permission is solved; public output is limited to the approved minimal derived display, credentials and raw payloads remain server-only, raw retention stays disabled unless explicitly covered, and secret-redacted disposition evidence is required

blockers.title: Authenticated TxLINE Devnet schema and terminal/correction semantics
evidence: docs/implementation-verification.md: redacted authenticated 14-day validation parsed 21,757 PascalCase records from 20 fixtures with zero failures, including 156 goals, 273 correction/VAR records, and 20 finalizations

blockers.title: Passkey SDK message/transaction/recovery/export device matrix
evidence: Devnet builds do not require NEXT_PUBLIC_PASSKEY_APP_ID; production-tier builds fail closed without it. Physical message-signing, transaction-signing, recovery, export, disconnect/reconnect, and Quickstart coverage remains outstanding

blockers.title: Deployed claim compute, contention, drain-time, and retry benchmark
evidence: docs/devnet-deployment.json acceptance.claimBenchmark: separate untouched-judge-campaign benchmark registered and settled exactly 100/100 winners over Foundation public Devnet RPC in 86.977 seconds with contiguous sequence/rank, zero timed claim retries, 970-byte claim transactions, p95 42,223 CU, exact 100,000,000-base-unit accounting, terminal recovery, vault closure, fixture release, and 100 temporary ATA closures

blockers.title: Devnet RPC and WebSocket capacity decision
evidence: docs/devnet-deployment.json acceptance.publicRpcCapacityProbe and acceptance.claimBenchmark: requester selected Foundation public Devnet RPC; a 100-transaction paced preflight/write probe and the 100/100 settlement benchmark passed, while archive/history reads are paced and broad scans remain fallback-safe

blockers.title: Eight-hour hard-timeout and postponed-match product approval
evidence: architecture.md Q9: requester authorized documented assumptions; eight-hour timeout and refund-on-postponement are adopted, while deployed provider completion/refund/release and local-validator hard-timeout paths both passed

blockers.title: Valueless classic SPL demo mint, faucet, and no-freeze policy
evidence: docs/devnet-deployment.json: classic six-decimal no-freeze valueless mint plus wallet-signed, one-distribution, 500-GOAL Devnet faucet passed on chain and duplicate use returned HTTP 409

blockers.title: Instant Demo signer containment and judge Quickstart review
evidence: docs/implementation-verification.md: production browser proved Instant Demo key absent from persistent storage and destroyed on reload; repository audit blocks private-key persistence; real registration/claim/transfer/reset path already passed
